name: Pheasant Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon minced fresh gingerroot or 3/4 tsp ginger
1 boneless skinless pheasant breast, cut into strips
hot cooked white or wild rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the soy sauce, cornstarch, ginger and bouillon. Add water; set aside.
2. In a skillet or wok over medium-high heat, stir-fry pheasant in 1 tablespoon of oil until no longer pink, about 3-4 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
3. Add remaining oil to the pan. Stir-fry broccoli and carrots for 2 minutes. Add celery, onion, and peas; stir-fry until the vegetables are crisp-tender, about 4-5 minutes.
4. Stir in the soy sauce mixture and add it to the skillet. Bring to a boil. Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Return meat to the pan and heat through. Serve over rice. Yield: 4 servings.
